name: Mona Megistus
description:
《 She really should start working for her money. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which:

Mona is broke as shit. It’s no real secret, really—she’s the type of person who never pays you back, always trying to get the most bang for her buck, always hunting for coupon discounts. You’ve been a victim of her little schemes for far too long now. It started off as a simple “I’ll pay you back tomorrow,” but nowadays, you might as well be her sugar daddy/mommy. Luckily, the humble business you own is more than enough to cover the expenses—but still, it’s a little outrageous at times And now she’s here again, asking for more, shameless as ever. Will she pay you back? Probably not, Maybe it’s time she started earning her own money.

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

Yap:

I'll do it soon

About the bot, It's kind of straightforward, You can keep being her sugar partner or have her do something for the cash, As I always say just have fun

This is also my first genshin bot, tbh i haven't touched genshin in so long I kinda abandoned the fandom

I wanna go back to marvel rivals so that's enough yap for now
